input:
Critique this diff. It adds a contradiction-phrase detector for session-log evidence:
```python
CONTRADICTION_PATTERNS = re.compile(r'not available|skipped|N/A|deferred|will validate|will run|TODO|pending|TBD', re.IGNORECASE)
def has_contradiction(text): return bool(CONTRADICTION_PATTERNS.search(text))
```
Tests cover 'will run pending tests' (true) and 'all tests passed' (false). Anything wrong?
